activities.title: Preview the Change
activities.target: Use visual or verbal preview 5 minutes before transition
activities.script_parent: 'In 5 minutes, we're cleaning up then eating lunch.' Show visual if helpful. Set timer.
activities.script_child: Let me tell you what's happening next so you're ready.
activities.success_criteria: Transitions more smoothly with preview than without 4/5 times
activities.generalization: All transitions at home and school

activities.title: 2-Minute Countdown
activities.target: Use visual countdown timer for end of preferred activity
activities.script_parent: '2 more minutes of [activity]!' Set visual timer. When it beeps: 'Timer's done, time to clean up!'
activities.script_child: The timer will tell you when it's time to stop.
activities.success_criteria: Stops activity when timer ends with 1 reminder or less 4/5 times
activities.generalization: Screen time, play time, bath time, any preferred activity

activities.title: Switch Signal
activities.target: Respond to consistent transition cue (song, bell, phrase)
activities.script_parent: Choose signal: cleanup song, bell ring, or 'Time to switch!' Use same one always. Then guide transition.
activities.script_child: When you hear the [signal], it means time to change activities.
activities.success_criteria: Begins transition within 30 sec of signal 4/5 times
activities.generalization: All activity transitions at home, can adapt for school

activities.title: Pack-and-Move
activities.target: Complete 2-step transition (pack up, move to next spot)
activities.script_parent: 'First pack up, then go to [next place].' Point to each step. Guide hands if needed. Fade to verbal only.
activities.script_child: Pack your things, then move to the next spot.
activities.success_criteria: Completes both steps with verbal prompt or less 4/5 transitions
activities.generalization: School transitions, activity changes, leaving places

activities.title: After-Switch Reward
activities.target: Earn small reward for smooth transitions
activities.script_parent: 'When you clean up nicely, you get [small reward].' Remind during. Give it right away if successful!
activities.script_child: If you do a nice job switching activities, you get [reward]!
activities.generalization: Difficult transitions, can fade once habit forms

activities.title: Calm First
activities.target: Use calming strategy before difficult transition
activities.script_parent: Before hard transition: 'Let's take 3 breaths first.' or 'Choose something from your menu.' Then transition.
activities.script_child: Let's get calm before we switch. What will help?
activities.success_criteria: Uses calming strategy before transition 3/5 difficult changes
activities.generalization: Leaving preferred activity, going to difficult task, big changes

activities.title: End-of-Day Close
activities.script_parent: Routine: 1) Pack tomorrow's backpack, 2) Set out clothes, 3) Brush teeth, 4) Set alarm, 5) Read/quiet time. Use checklist!
activities.script_child: Let's close out today and get ready for tomorrow.
activities.success_criteria: Completes 4/5 steps with checklist reference only
activities.generalization: Every school night, adapted for weekends
